name: iron-valiant
flavor_text: It has some similarities to a mad scientist’s invention covered in a paranormal magazine.

moves.name: disable
moves.effect: Disables the target’s last used move for 1-8 turns.

moves.name: double-team
moves.effect: Raises the user’s evasion by one stage.

moves.name: fury-cutter
moves.effect: Power doubles every turn this move is used in succession after the first, maxing out after five turns.

moves.name: shadow-sneak
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: hypnosis
moves.effect: Puts the target to sleep.

moves.name: feint
moves.effect: Hits through Protect and Detect.

moves.name: psycho-cut
moves.effect: Has an increased chance for a critical hit.

moves.name: night-slash
moves.effect: Has an increased chance for a critical hit.

moves.name: leaf-blade
moves.effect: Has an increased chance for a critical hit.

moves.name: moonblast
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to lower the target’s Special Attack by one stage.

moves.name: destiny-bond
moves.effect: If the user faints this turn, the target automatically will, too.

moves.name: wide-guard
moves.effect: Prevents any multi-target moves from hitting friendly Pokémon this turn.

moves.name: quick-guard
moves.effect: Prevents any priority moves from hitting friendly Pokémon this turn.

moves.name: spirit-break
moves.effect: Has a 100% chance to lower the target’s Special Attack by one stage.

moves.name: aerial-ace
moves.effect: Never misses.

moves.name: agility
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Speed by two stages.

moves.name: aura-sphere
moves.effect: Never misses.

moves.name: brick-break
moves.effect: Destroys Reflect and Light Screen.

moves.name: calm-mind
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Special Attack and Special Defense by one stage.

moves.name: charge-beam
moves.effect: Has a 70% chance to raise the user’s Special Attack by one stage.

moves.name: close-combat
moves.effect: Lowers the user’s Defense and Special Defense by one stage after inflicting damage.

moves.name: coaching
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: confuse-ray
moves.effect: Confuses the target.

moves.name: dazzling-gleam
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: drain-punch
moves.effect: Drains half the damage inflicted to heal the user.

moves.name: electric-terrain
moves.effect: For five turns, prevents all Pokémon on the ground from sleeping and strengthens their electric moves to 1.5× their power.

moves.name: encore
moves.effect: Forces the target to repeat its last used move every turn for 2 to 6 turns.

moves.name: endure
moves.effect: Prevents the user’s HP from lowering below 1 this turn.

moves.name: energy-ball
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.

moves.name: expanding-force
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: false-swipe
moves.effect: Cannot lower the target’s HP below 1.

moves.name: fire-punch
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to burn the target.

moves.name: fling
moves.effect: Throws held item at the target; power depends on the item.

moves.name: focus-blast
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.

moves.name: future-sight
moves.effect: Hits the target two turns later.

moves.name: giga-impact
moves.effect: User foregoes its next turn to recharge.

moves.name: grass-knot
moves.effect: Inflicts more damage to heavier targets, with a maximum of 120 power.

moves.name: helping-hand
moves.effect: Ally’s next move inflicts half more damage.

moves.name: hex
moves.effect: Has double power if the target has a major status ailment.

moves.name: hyper-beam
moves.effect: User foregoes its next turn to recharge.

moves.name: hyper-voice
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: ice-punch
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to freeze the target.

moves.name: icy-wind
moves.effect: Has a 100% chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.

moves.name: imprison
moves.effect: Prevents the target from using any moves that the user also knows.

moves.name: knock-off
moves.effect: Target drops its held item.

moves.name: light-screen
moves.effect: Reduces damage from special attacks by 50% for five turns.

moves.name: liquidation
moves.effect: Has a 20% chance to lower the target’s Defense by one stage.

moves.name: low-kick
moves.effect: Inflicts more damage to heavier targets, with a maximum of 120 power.

moves.name: magical-leaf
moves.effect: Never misses.

moves.name: metronome
moves.effect: Randomly selects and uses any move in the game.

moves.name: misty-terrain
moves.effect: For five turns, protects all Pokémon on the ground from major status ailments and confusion, and halves the power of incoming dragon moves.

moves.name: poison-jab
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to poison the target.

moves.name: protect
moves.effect: Prevents any moves from hitting the user this turn.

moves.name: psybeam
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to confuse the target.

moves.name: psych-up
moves.effect: Discards the user’s stat changes and copies the target’s.

moves.name: psychic
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.

moves.name: psychic-terrain
moves.effect: Protects Pokémon on the ground from priority moves and increases the power of their  Psychic moves by 50%.

moves.name: psyshock
moves.effect: Inflicts damage based on the target’s Defense, not Special Defense.

moves.name: reflect
moves.effect: Reduces damage from physical attacks by half.

moves.name: rest
moves.effect: User sleeps for two turns, completely healing itself.

moves.name: reversal
moves.effect: Inflicts more damage when the user has less HP remaining, with a maximum of 200 power.

moves.name: shadow-ball
moves.effect: Has a 20% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.

moves.name: shadow-claw
moves.effect: Has an increased chance for a critical hit.

moves.name: skill-swap
moves.effect: User and target swap abilities.

moves.name: sleep-talk
moves.effect: Randomly uses one of the user’s other three moves.  Only works if the user is sleeping.

moves.name: stored-power
moves.effect: Power is higher the more the user’s stats have been raised, to a maximum of 31×.

moves.name: substitute
moves.effect: Transfers 1/4 of the user’s max HP into a doll, protecting the user from further damage or status changes until it breaks.

moves.name: swift
moves.effect: Never misses.

moves.name: swords-dance
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Attack by two stages.

moves.name: taunt
moves.effect: For the next few turns, the target can only use damaging moves.

moves.name: throat-chop
moves.effect: Prevents the target from using sound-based moves for two turns.

moves.name: thunder-punch
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: thunder-wave
moves.effect: Paralyzes the target.

moves.name: thunderbolt
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: trick
moves.effect: User and target swap items.

moves.name: trick-room
moves.effect: For five turns, slower Pokémon will act before faster Pokémon.

moves.name: vacuum-wave
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: x-scissor
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: zen-headbutt
moves.effect: Has a 20% chance to make the target flinch.

abilitiesDetailed.name: quark-drive
abilitiesDetailed.effect: Raises highest stat on Electric Terrain, or if holding Booster Energy.
